title: IIM Visakhapatnam Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Manager, Research Associate Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIM Visakhapatnam) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Manager, Research Associate Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post-graduation, MBA, PGDM can apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
